description: For Transformer Thermal Impact assessement due to geomagnetic disturbance event, set the geoelectric field waveshape as NERC TPL-007-2 supplemental event. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.12.0 and 34.4.0. ierr = gic_efield_waveshape_supp()
